title: BL Custom Death Sounds
description: Choose ANY Minecraft sound effect to play on player death. Search sounds, preview them instantly, and customize volume & pitch.
body:
# 💀 Custom Death Sound

Turn every death message into absolute chaos.

Custom Death Sound lets you choose **ANY Minecraft sound event** to play whenever someone dies in chat. From Wither spawns to goat screams, explosions, anvils, music disc sounds, or even the most cursed vanilla audio imaginable — if Minecraft can play it, this mod can use it.

No resource packs. No commands. No editing config files manually.

Just open the menu, search for a sound, preview it instantly, and save it as your death sound.

---

## ✨ Features

* 🔎 Search through **all Minecraft sound events**
* 🎵 Use virtually any built-in Minecraft sound as a death sound
* 🔊 Adjustable volume slider
* 📈 Adjustable pitch slider
* ▶️ Instant sound preview button
* 💬 Detects tons of vanilla-style death messages
* ⚡ Lightweight client-side mod
* 🧩 Clean custom UI with scrolling sound browser
* 🎮 Works great for SMPs, trolling, chaos, content creation, and memes

---

## 🎧 Examples

Some funny sound ideas:

* Wither spawn
* Creeper explosion
* Goat scream
* Villager no
* Anvil land
* Ender dragon growl
* TNT prime
* Warden sonic boom
* XP pickup
* Cat meow

---

## 🖥️ How To Use
1. Open ModMenu and search BL Custom Death Sounds
2. Open the mod config screen
3. Search for any sound
4. Click a sound to select it
5. Adjust volume & pitch
6. Preview it
7. Save and enjoy the chaos 💀

---

## 📦 Notes

* Client-side only
* Uses Minecraft's built-in sound registry
* Supports thousands of vanilla sound events
* Sound IDs can be searched instantly in-game
